parameters.command-line: fimo --verbosity 1 --oc xstreme_out/fimo_out_5 --bgfile xstreme_out/background --motif CACACACACACACAC xstreme_out/meme_out/meme.xml '/Users/ronaldcutler/EinsteinMed Dropbox/Ronald Cutler/Vijg-lab/Collaborations/Jackson Rogow/transcriptomics/analysis/with-virus-and-stem-loop-unique/batch-2-arc-rep1-removed/motif_enrichment/1-extract-seq/log2fc_greaterthan_5_padj_lessthan_0p05.fasta'
